ThingDef.label: 【First-rate】Oblivion soul-purging elixir
ThingDef.description: "The primordial celestial immortals spent countless years in arduous contemplation, creating the Nine Primal Initial Approach. However, as their strength waned, they transmuted the remnants of their surroundings into a pill to erase their own knowledge, thus naming it the Soul-Purging Elixir. ——Records of the Celestial Immortals\n\nThis is a most enigmatic and wondrous elixir, its formula personally passed down by the immortals and unchanged through millennia. Only those with unwavering resolve, truly willing to abandon the Initial Approach they have mastered, can experience its effects. Should doubt linger in their hearts, the pill will be powerless, and the Initial Approach shall remain.

ThingDef.label: 【First-rate】LingLong moonlight elixir
ThingDef.description: First-rate elixir, greatly increases the chance of successful breakthroughs. Crafted primarily from LingLong Fruit, it appears crystal-clear and emits a sweet, fragrant aroma—truly unique among elixirs.\n\nAccording to ancient cultivation records, in worlds where spiritual energy is scarce and breakthroughs are difficult, a radiant, nameless fairy once appeared. She brought LingLong Fruit and, with a deft command of alchemical fire, refined the pill from afar, astonishing all who witnessed it. Though it cannot reverse the harsh environment, the pill channels the essence of heaven and earth, granting cultivators a glimpse of hope for their breakthroughs.

ThingDef.label: 【First-rate】LingLong wine
ThingDef.description: First-rate medicinal wine, capable of healing most wounds within a single day. Brewed primarily from LingLong fruit and Condensed spiritual liquid, this immortal draught is rich in the energy of heaven and earth, nourishing the body and repairing injuries.\n\nThis medicine, delivered alongside LingLong fruit by an unknown immortal maiden, caused an immediate sensation throughout the cultivation world and has since become an elixir worth a fortune, nearly impossible to obtain.

ThingDef.label: 【Second-rate】QiLin restoration pill
ThingDef.description: Second-rate Elixir，The QiLin restoration pill is a pale green pill with a subtle bamboo fragrance. It is refined from the most healing ingredients, capable of healing skin scars and mildly enhancing the body's natural healing abilities.

ThingDef.label: 【Second-rate】Condensed spiritual liquid
ThingDef.description: Second-rate liquid, taste like water, can recover some Qi.
